sub_manga_fullmetal-alchemist_2001.title: 강철의 연금술사
sub_manga_fullmetal-alchemist_2001.creator: 아라카와 히로
sub_manga_fullmetal-alchemist_2001.description: 연금술사 형제가 잃은 몸을 되찾기 위해 필사적으로 여행하는 대서사.

sub_manga_fire-force_2015.title: 불꽃 소방대
sub_manga_fire-force_2015.creator: 오바 다카히로
sub_manga_fire-force_2015.description: 인간이 불타는 현상을 진압하는 특수 소방대의 활약.

sub_manga_fairy-tail_2006.title: 페어리 테일
sub_manga_fairy-tail_2006.creator: 마시마 히로
sub_manga_fairy-tail_2006.description: 마법 길드 페어리 테일의 모험과 우정 이야기.

sub_manga_fruits-basket_1998.title: 후르츠 바스켓
sub_manga_fruits-basket_1998.creator: 타카야 나츠키
sub_manga_fruits-basket_1998.description: 십이지 신의 저주에 걸린 소년과 가족들의 로맨스 판타지.

sub_manga_fire-punch-a87170_2016.title: ファイアパンチ
sub_manga_fire-punch-a87170_2016.description:
Orphaned siblings Agni and Luna, like the Ice Witch who cursed their world, are two of the “blessed,” humans who hold special abilities. However, not all who are blessed are friendly, and after another of their kind attacks Agni and decimates the orphans' village, Agni fights to survive, vowing revenge.

(Source: VIZ Media)

sub_manga_fairy-tail-a30598_2006.title: FAIRY TAIL
sub_manga_fairy-tail-a30598_2006.description:
Cute girl wizard Lucy wants to join the Fairy Tail, a club for the most powerful wizards. But instead her ambitions land her in the clutches of a gang of unsavory pirates led by a devious magician. Her only hope is Natsu, a strange boy she happens to meet on her travels. Natsu’s not your typical hero—he gets motion sickness, eats like a pig, and his best friend is a talking cat. With friends like this, is Lucy better off with her enemies?

(Source: Kodansha USA)

Note: Includes four extra chapters.

sub_manga_fumetsu-no-anata-e-a97830_2016.title: 不滅のあなたへ
sub_manga_fumetsu-no-anata-e-a97830_2016.description:
A lonely boy wandering the Arctic regions of North America meets a wolf, and the two become fast friends, depending on each other to survive the harsh environment. But the boy has a history, and the wolf is more than meets the eye as well … 

(Source: Kodansha USA)

Note: Includes one extra chapter.

sub_manga_fuufu-ijou-koibito-miman-a1050.title: 夫婦以上、恋人未満。
sub_manga_fuufu-ijou-koibito-miman-a1050.description:
Jirou, a third-year in high school, is forced to live with a gyaru named Akari under a course called the "Couple Practical". In order to be paired with their own romantic interests, they're going to act as a married couple...!?
Note: Nominated for the Tsugimanga 2020 Award in the Manga Category.

sub_manga_fruits-basket-a30102_1998.title: フルーツバスケット
sub_manga_fruits-basket-a30102_1998.description:
After a family tragedy turns her life upside down, plucky high schooler Tohru Honda takes matters into her own hands and moves out...into a tent! Unfortunately for her, she pitches her new home on private land belonging to the mysterious Sohma clan, and it isn't long before the owners discover her secret. But, as Tohru quickly finds out when the family offers to take her in, the Sohmas have a secret of their own--when touched by the opposite sex, they turn into the animals of the Chinese Zodiac! 

(Source: Yen Press) 
Note: Volume 9 includes the bonus chapter "Rain Shelter of Terror".

sub_manga_fff-geum-gwansimyongsa-a113666.title: FFF급 관심용사
sub_manga_fff-geum-gwansimyongsa-a113666.description: Han-Soo Kang was an average boy living in the normal world when he was suddenly summoned to Fantasia, a fantasy world run by demons. Deemed the Chosen Hero, he’s spent the last ten years building himself up to defeat the lord of Fantasia - which turned out to be a piece of cake. As he eagerly awaits his return to the real world, the “god” of Fantasia appears and throws a wrench in his plan: a report card that reveals there’s more to being a hero than just might.(Source: Tappytoon, edited)

sub_manga_fairy-tail-100-years-quest-a10.title: FAIRY TAIL 100 YEARS QUEST
sub_manga_fairy-tail-100-years-quest-a10.description:
Natsu, Lucy, Happy, Erza, and the whole Fairy Tail Guild are back in action! And they’ve decided to tackle the “100 Years Quest”—a job no one’s dared take on since the founding of the guild more than a century ago. A mysterious town, a baffling spirit, a ghastly new enemy … and a brand new continent to explore. When you’re with real friends, the adventures never stop!

(Source: Kodansha USA)

sub_manga_futsuu-ni-kiite-kure-a151194_2.title: フツーに聞いてくれ
sub_manga_futsuu-ni-kiite-kure-a151194_2.description:
A student presents his crush with a love song that he wrote, recorded himself performing, and uploaded to YouTube, and he tells her to watch it before giving him a reply. When he returns to school the next day, he finds that the girl has shown the video to the entire class over LINE. Amid the jeering of his classmates, she snidely apologizes to him and explains that his video was hilarious enough to warrant sharing.

However, his decision to remove the upload is curbed after a ghost is spotted within the video, and a classmate advises against its deletion. His YouTube post eventually gains popularity as the growing audience discovers more anomalies, all intent on deciphering the hidden messages that its very uploader had not even intended.

A unique one-shot from the mad genius behind Chainsaw Man and the rising star of To Strip the Flesh.

sub_manga_freesia-a31131_2001.title: フリージア
sub_manga_freesia-a31131_2001.description:
Freesia is set in an alternative Japanese society that is at war, and has passed a law legalizing retaliatory killings. If somebody kills your loved one, you are legally sanctioned to kill, or hire someone to kill, the victimizer. The manga is set around a character who works for a firm that specializes in these retaliatory killings.
(Source: OneManga)

sub_manga_futari-ashita-mo-sorenari-ni-a.title: ふたり明日もそれなりに
sub_manga_futari-ashita-mo-sorenari-ni-a.description:
Yuya Aida (25) and Rio Aihara (28) are in their second month of living together. More than lovers but less than married, they're still more or less content.

(Source: One Peace Books)

Notes: 
- Includes five extra chapters.
- Nominated for the Tsugimanga 2020 Award in the Web Manga Category.

sub_manga_fechippuru-bokura-no-junsui-na.title: フェチップル～僕らの純粋な恋～
sub_manga_fechippuru-bokura-no-junsui-na.description:
Yunoki has not only found himself in bed with a woman he doesn't know, but she insists they're already a couple?! The woman, Kotoka Hatsushima, is a charming, 23-year-old writer...who has one heck of a back fetish, and Yunoki fit the bill! And when she tells Yunoki that it was her hair that sealed the deal for him, he realizes the truth—she knows about his hair fetish, AND she's absolutely right! He's mortified, but Kotoka sees reason—if they float each others' boats and already know about each other's predilictions...why not start a relationship? And Yunoki can't argue with that...thus the back/hair (not to be confused with back hair!) hijinks ensue!(Source: Kodansha USA)

Note: Includes 2 extra chapters.

sub_manga_fukakai-na-boku-no-subete-wo-a.title: 不可解なぼくのすべてを
sub_manga_fukakai-na-boku-no-subete-wo-a.description: Mogumo is a cute but lonely high school student who just wants a few loving friends. Fellow student Iwaoka Tetsu invites Mogumo to work at his family’s café for “cross-dressing boys,” but he makes an incorrect assumption: Mogumo is non-binary and doesn’t identify as a boy or a girl. However, Mogumo soon finds out that the café is run by LGBT+ folks of all stripes, all with their own reasons for congregating there.(Source: Seven Seas Entertainment)
